name: Reduced-Fat Crab Rangoon
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Lump crab meat, drained and flaked
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine all ingredients except won ton skins and vegetable spray coating; mix until well blended.
2. To prevent the won ton skins from drying out, prepare one or two Rangoons at a time.
3. Place 1 teaspoon of filling in the center of each won ton skin.
4. Fold down the bottom corners of the won ton skin and overlap slightly.
5. Moisturize one corner with vegetable spray coating and press to seal the Rangoon.
6. Lightly spray a baking sheet with vegetable coating.
7. Arrange the Rangoons on the sheet and lightly coat them with vegetable spray.
8. Bake in a 425-degree oven for 12-15 minutes, or until golden brown.
9. Serve hot with sweet-sour sauce or mustard sauce.
